testcase.name: test_main_download_video_with_quality

failure.message: assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = <Result TypeError("'coroutine' object is not iterable")>.exit_code

testcase.failure:
def test_main_download_video_with_quality(): runner = CliRunner() with patch( "apyrat.apyrat.Downloader._get_available_qualities", return_value=["480", "720", "1080"], ) as mock_qualities: result = runner.invoke( main, [ "https://www.aparat.com/v/qur3I", "-q", "720", ], ) > assert result.exit_code == 0 E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = <Result TypeError("'coroutine' object is not iterable")>.exit_code
tests/cli_test.py:21: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_main_download_video_without_quality

failure.message: assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = <Result TypeError("'coroutine' object is not iterable")>.exit_code

testcase.failure:
def test_main_download_video_without_quality(): runner = CliRunner() with patch( "apyrat.apyrat.Downloader._get_available_qualities", return_value=["480", "720", "1080"], ), patch("click.prompt", return_value="720"): result = runner.invoke(main, ["https://www.aparat.com/v/qur3I"]) > assert result.exit_code == 0 E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = <Result TypeError("'coroutine' object is not iterable")>.exit_code
tests/cli_test.py:32: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_get_quality_available
testcase.failure:
def test_get_quality_available(): > downloader = Downloader("https://www.aparat.com/v/qur3I") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/cli_test.py:36: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ apyrat/apyrat.py:40: in __init__ self.qualities = self._get_available_qualities() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <apyrat.apyrat.Downloader object at 0x1127bb390>
def _get_available_qualities(self): qualities = set( video_quality.get("profile") > for video in self.videos ^^^^^^^^^^^ for video_quality in video ) E TypeError: 'coroutine' object is not iterable
apyrat/apyrat.py:109: TypeError

testcase.name: test_download_when_file_exists
testcase.failure:
mock_wget = <MagicMock name='download' id='4605450896'> mock_isfile = <MagicMock name='isfile' id='4605451232'>
@patch("os.path.isfile", return_value=True) @patch("wget.download") def test_download_when_file_exists(mock_wget, mock_isfile): > downloader = Downloader("https://www.aparat.com/v/qur3I", "outputfile") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

self = <apyrat.apyrat.Downloader object at 0x1127ea360>
def _get_available_qualities(self): qualities = set( video_quality.get("profile") > for video in self.videos ^^^^^^^^^^^ for video_quality in video ) E TypeError: 'coroutine' object is not iterable
apyrat/apyrat.py:109: TypeError
